title: TitanPRO™ Plastic Folding Table - 8'x30'' banquet
features: The TitanPRO™ 8' x 30" plastic folding banquet table seats 8 to 10 guests and is built for the load and frequency demands of commercial operations.

High-density polyethylene construction, 16-gauge powder-coated steel legs, a 500+ lb. weight capacity, and non-marring floor glides deliver the durability rental fleets, event venues, hotels, and schools require.
Standard 2'' tabletop thickness easily accepts skirting
Thick 16 gauge powder coated steel legs

Seats 8 to 10 guests and covers the widest range of event formats. At 8' x 30", this is the standard large-format banquet configuration for seated dinners, buffet lines, conference layouts, and vendor setups — the single table size that handles the most event types in a commercial rental or venue inventory.

Built to last through years of heavy commercial use. High-density polyethylene construction and 16-gauge powder-coated steel legs give this table the structural durability to handle repeated setups, heavy loads, and everyday wear without warping, rusting, or degrading over time.

Locks open securely so every event runs safely. Gravity-lock safety rings engage automatically when legs are deployed, keeping the table stable under shifting weight and eliminating the risk of unexpected leg collapse during service or setup.

Works with the tablecloths and skirting you already own. The 2" standard-thickness tabletop and 30" height are sized to industry standard, so existing linens fit correctly and skirting clips attach without adapters or workarounds.

Protects your venue floors at every event. Non-marring floor glides on all four feet prevent scratching on hardwood, vinyl, concrete, and polished surfaces, reducing floor damage and the associated repair costs over the life of your inventory.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more

faq.question: Does this table ship assembled?
faq.answer: Yes, the TitanPRO ships fully assembled. No setup is required beyond unfolding the legs before first use. Bulk orders of 10 or more qualify for free shipping deals, and large orders can be quoted for additional wholesale pricing.

faq.question: How does the TitanPRO™ compare to tables sold at Home Depot or Costco?
faq.answer: Consumer-grade plastic folding tables are typically built with 18-gauge steel legs and thinner tabletop cores designed for occasional home use. The TitanPRO™ uses 16-gauge legs, commercial-grade HDPE, and gravity-lock safety rings engineered for the frequency and load demands of rental and venue operations. The 3-year commercial warranty reflects that difference.

faq.question: How many people does an 8-foot folding table seat?
faq.answer: An 8' x 30" banquet table seats 8 comfortably and up to 10 in tighter configurations.

faq.question: What size tablecloth fits an 8-foot banquet table?
faq.answer: For a full floor-length drop, use a 60" x 126" tablecloth. For a mid-length drop that covers the legs, a 60" x 102" works well. Both sizes are available on EventStable.com and are designed specifically for 8' banquet table dimensions.

faq.question: Is this table suitable for outdoor use?
faq.answer: Yes. The HDPE top resists moisture and UV exposure, and the powder-coated steel legs resist rust under normal outdoor conditions. Storing tables indoors between events will extend their lifespan significantly and is recommended for any commercial operation.

faq.question: Does the 8' table ship assembled?
faq.answer: Yes, the TitanPRO™ ships fully assembled. No setup is required beyond unfolding the legs before first use. Bulk orders of 10 or more qualify for wholesale pricing and free shipping.
